title: SNLI - Textual Entailment
description: Natural language inference over sentence pairs from the Stanford Natural Language Inference corpus (Bowman et al., EMNLP 2015). Annotators classify the relationship between a premise and hypothesis as entailment, contradiction, or neutral.
